name: Battlewasp - Ballista the Armageddon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｂ・Ｆ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビー・フォース</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>決</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のビッグ・バリスタ
name_jp_rom: Bī Fōsu - Kessen no Biggu Barisuta
name_jp_tl: Bee Force - Big Ballista the Armageddon
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Special Summoned: You can banish all Insect monsters from your GY; all monsters your opponent currently controls lose 500 ATK/DEF for each of your banished Insect monsters. If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this Synchro Summoned card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 3 of your banished Level 11 or lower Insect monsters.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters

If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage. If this Synchro Summoned card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 3 of your banished Level 11 or lower Insect monsters.

jp_sets.set: Collection Pack: Duelist of Revolution Version

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
